Industries and Agro and Rur,,1 Indu';L<';':i ~()lfI~J~l\1rI()t~ .: New Delhi, the 29th October. 1992 G.S.R. g32(E) .-Wherea1\ the draft of the rules in amend the Coir lustry Rules, 1954, was published as required by sub-section (1) of section of the Coir Industry Act, 1953 (45 of 1953), with the not.ificatipIl of the vemment of India in the Ministry of Industry (Department of Small Scale lustries & Agro and Rural Industries) No. G.S.R. 694(E) , dated the 30th y, 1992 in the Gazette of India, Extraordimlry, Part H, Section 3, Sub-section dated the 30th July, 199 2~ inviting objections and suggestions from. all :som; likely to be affected thereby within a. period of 45 days from the date rhe publication of the said notification in the Official Gazette : And whereas no objections or sugge~rions were received from the public the said draft, within the said period; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of tion 26 of the said Act, the Central Gov'enunent hereby makes the f(~Ho\ving es, namely :-- RULES 1. These Rules may be called the Coir Industry (Amendment) Rules .. 1992. 2. In the Coif Industry Rules, 1954, in rule 4, in sub-rule (1), in category (g) ~ for the figure "3" .. the figure "6" shall be substituted. (F..No. 6(··~·)i90-Coirl S. B. :rvtqHAPATRA, J't. Secy.
